observation_window_description: 60 s of pgbench at 10 clients (~3,750 tps; 112,534 transactions) on a freshly-initialised pgbench dataset
observation_source: /proc/<pid>/maps of all postgres-anchor processes, mapped to Debian packages via dpkg-query -S
_note: This is a real runtime observation, not synthetic. It substitutes for a Falco event stream in the present prototype: Falco's eBPF rules would surface the same shared-library file-open events; we read them from /proc instead. See chapter 6 §6.5.4.
